creator: oleg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Would be fine to look at kernel backtrace. Can you get one?
Recipe is here:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug-gdb.html

-- 
Oleg.
